user_system_path: Connector depth (#514): make Google Drive actually deep. lib/sync/google-sync.ts:syncDrive enumerates the whole Drive (newest-modified first, no modifiedTime floor) instead of only files modified within the lookback window, skips files already stored by content_hash so it self-heals existing accounts without re-downloading, and bounds new-file work per run so a large backfill spreads across runs. Mirrors the OneDrive depth fix (#507).
allowed_files_raw: lib/sync/google-sync.ts (syncDrive: drop the modifiedTime floor, enumerate full Drive newest-first capped at DRIVE_MAX_FILES, skip already-stored files by content_hash, cap new files per run at DRIVE_MAX_NEW_PER_RUN; new exported buildDriveBackfillQuery helper; drop the now-unused sinceMs arg from the syncDrive call) + lib/sync/__tests__/google-sync.test.ts (assert the query enumerates trashed=false with no modifiedTime clause). Control-plane governance files.
forbidden_files_raw: No Stripe, Scout, schema/migration, or secrets changes. No new sign-in surface. No auto-send. Do not touch the Gmail or Calendar sync paths.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck && npx vitest run lib/sync/__tests__/google-sync.test.ts
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): after the next full Google sync, the drive signal count climbs well past 186 and includes files older than the previous 1-year window.
browser_proof_command: manual: after a full sync runs, re-run the per-source freshness query and confirm drive total > 186 with older occurred_at values present.
acceptance_condition: syncDrive enumerates all supported non-trashed Drive files newest-first with no modifiedTime floor, skips files already stored by content_hash, and caps new files per run; buildDriveBackfillQuery contains no modifiedTime clause; gate:continuity + typecheck green; the google-sync test suite green incl. the new query assertion.
anti_regression_checks: buildDriveBackfillQuery has no modifiedTime clause and filters trashed=false
syncDrive skips files already stored (content_hash) so it does not re-download every run
no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations; Gmail/Calendar paths untouched
stop_condition: Drive deep backfill lands as a PR on claude/drive-backfill-514 targeting #514; gate:continuity + typecheck + the google-sync suite green. Live backfill (drive count climbing past 186) is owner-validated after the next full sync.
next_command: Owner: merge #514, then let the nightly full sync run (or trigger it) and re-check Drive freshness. Optional next: same whole-drive enumeration for OneDrive (#507); Scout #494 activation.
